Details: Pre-oxidation with ozone is effective for molinate degradation. One study found that 3 milligrams per liter ozone removed 75 percent of molinate in less than one minute [723]. The same study showed that ozone in combination with coagulation (40 milligrams per liter of aluminum sulphate as Al), did not improve molinate removal, but when used in combination with coagulation and powdered activated carbon (10 milligrams per liter), molinate removal increased to 95 percent.
